head.text: Nervous, uneasy, depressed. Dizzy. Rush of blood to head. Sharp pain in forehead

mouth_throat.text: Feels as if scalded; sensation of heat down œsophagus. Itching of the palate

Constant clearing and hemming. Dry, posterior nares; no relief from clearing. Throat feels swollen; epiglottis dry and burning. Difficult swallowing. Constant desire to swallow saliva. Uvula feels elongated

stomach_abdomen.text: Sense of weight. Belching of wind alternating with hiccough. Nausea and vomiting
Pain below ribs of right side

stool_rectum.text: Loose, dark, at night. Itching of anus. Constipation, with hæmorrhoids; not bleeding

respiratory.text: Dry, hacking cough, caused by tickling of the epiglottis. Burning sensation in the bronchial tubes. Tendency to get hoarse talking or singing; throat hot, dry. Dry asthma

female.text: Pain in left ovary, shooting down to knee. Pain in uterus; could outline its contour

extremities.text: Pain in back; extends to end of spine. Pain right arm, stiffness of wrist and hand. Aching pains all over

fever_chill.text: Chill at 11 am. Thirst for ice-water during chill. No thirst with heat. Profuse sweat all night. Terrific headache during sweat

keynotes.text: color="#800000">WYETHIA HELENOIDES Poison-weed (WYETHIA) Has marked effects on the throat, and has proven an excellent remedy in pharyngitis, especially the follicular form. Irritable throats of singers and public speakers. Useful also in hæmorrhoids. Hay-fever symptoms; itching in posterior nares.
